## ZIT controlnet union - Links

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors: 7.49GB](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors: 11.4GB](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors)

**vae**

- [ae.safetensors: 319MB](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors)

**model_patches**

- [Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union.safetensors: 2.88GB](https://huggingface.co/alibaba-pai/Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union/resolve/main/Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union.safetensors)
- [Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union-2.0.safetensors: 6.25GB](https://huggingface.co/alibaba-pai/Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union-2.0/resolve/main/Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union-2.0.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │      └── ae.safetensors
│   └── 📂 model_patches/
│          └── Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union.safetensors
```
Latina female with thick wavy hair, harbor boats and pastel houses behind. Breezy seaside light, warm tones, cinematic close-up.

Hyper-realistic cinematic portrait of a seductive woman posing against a weathered minimalist charcoal-gray concrete wall with subtle industrial textures. She is wearing an exquisite form-fitting black strapless corset dress featuring intricate 3D floral lace embroidery and sheer Victorian-inspired detailing across the bodice. Her expression is alluring and confident with a soft sultry gaze and a deep crimson matte lip. Her long raven-black hair is styled in voluminous waves and partially swept back; her left hand is elegantly draped over her crown while the fingers of her right hand graze the silken strands cascading over her shoulders. Dramatic Rembrandt lighting creates deep moody shadows and sharp highlights on her porcelain skin with a soft rim light separating her silhouette from the background. Shot on 85mm prime lens, f/1.8 aperture, sharp focus on the eyes, subtle film grain, 8k resolution, high dynamic range, evocative noir aesthetic.

Hyper-realistic cinematic portrait of a seductive woman wearing an exquisite form-fitting black strapless corset dress with intricate 3D floral lace embroidery. Dramatic Rembrandt lighting, porcelain skin, deep crimson matte lip, raven-black hair in voluminous waves. Shot on 85mm lens, f/1.8, 8k resolution, noir aesthetic.
Enable to upscale alpha/mask channel along with RGB channel (for RGBA inputs)
Enable torch.compile optimization. First batch has compilation overhead, but speeds up subsequent batches. Best for long videos, not single images.
